title: parameria angustior
intro: Parameria angustior, also known as the narrow-leaved parameria or Thai jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Parameria angustior include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Thai medicine to promote overall well-being.
